statusPolicy.implemented: Provider has repository code, unit or integration evidence, guide documentation, and an executable gate.
statusPolicy.planned: Provider is a known adoption target, but must not be advertised as supported until implementation, tests, and release gates exist.
statusPolicy.config-only: Provider exists for another subsystem and must not be implied as a discovery adapter without a discovery implementation.

rows.dependencyBoundary: Memory discovery is root-owned and must remain dependency-free for local, generated, and rollback smoke tests.
rows.observabilityEvidence: Matrix capabilities record register, resolve, watch, TTL lease, health filtering, metadata filtering, and watcher cleanup behavior.
rows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to memory discovery for local smoke and generated examples when networked discovery providers are unavailable.
rows.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep memory discovery enabled as the safe rollback path until provider-specific resolver and watch evidence passes.

rows.dependencyBoundary: Consul client upgrades require dependency evidence, discovery matrix review, and integration ownership before release promotion.
rows.observabilityEvidence: Consul matrix rows expose registration, health filtering, watch, TTL lease, metadata filters, and failover guidance.
rows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to memory discovery or the previous Consul registration path when health checks or watches diverge.
rows.rollbackOrEscalation: Route traffic through the previous consul profile until Consul watch, health, dependency, and integration evidence pass.

rows.dependencyBoundary: etcd client, lease, watch, resolver, and TLS upgrades require dependency evidence plus optional Docker-backed integration evidence.
rows.observabilityEvidence: etcdv3 unit and integration entries cover register, resolve, watch, TTL lease, health filtering, metadata filtering, and failover behavior.
rows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to memory discovery or the previous etcd service registration path when lease or watch evidence fails.
rows.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous etcdv3 registration compatible until generated services pass discovery smoke and integration gates.

rows.dependencyBoundary: Nacos dependencies are scoped to config source ownership until a dedicated discovery adapter task adds resolver semantics.
rows.observabilityEvidence: The matrix records Nacos as config-only and keeps register, resolve, watch, TTL, and filtering capabilities false.
rows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to existing platform discovery while Nacos remains config-only and cannot route discovery traffic.
rows.rollbackOrEscalation: Do not promote Nacos discovery until a core/discovery/nacos adapter, tests, integration evidence, and rollback notes exist.

rows.dependencyBoundary: DNS discovery must stay dependency-light and resolver-only until TTL, negative-cache, and generated profile evidence lands.
rows.observabilityEvidence: The planned row records missing register, watch, TTL lease, health filtering, metadata filtering, and resolver semantics.
rows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to existing platform DNS or application configuration until resolver-only behavior is implemented and documented.
rows.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep dns-backed services on existing platform discovery until gofly DNS resolver tests and rollback guidance pass.

rows.dependencyBoundary: Kubernetes discovery must not add cluster credentials to local tests and must align with Helm, Kustomize, RBAC, and EndpointSlice evidence.
rows.observabilityEvidence: The planned row records Service, EndpointSlice, watch, RBAC, Helm, and Kustomize promotion criteria without claiming runtime support.
rows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to native Kubernetes Service discovery until gofly adapter endpoint, policy, fixture, and optional integration evidence exists.
rows.rollbackOrEscalation: Use existing Kubernetes service discovery directly until adapter semantics and cloud-native production gates pass.

rows.dependencyBoundary: Static discovery must validate file path safety, reload behavior, and generated profile boundaries before any file-backed adapter lands.
rows.observabilityEvidence: The planned row records immutable and reloadable profile requirements, path safety, generated smoke, and rollback criteria.
rows.fallbackBehavior: Fallback to application configuration or memory discovery until static reload, validation, and generated smoke coverage exists.
rows.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep static endpoints outside gofly discovery until path validation, reload evidence, and rollback notes are machine-checked.

providers.promotionBoundary: Memory discovery remains the local and generated-project fallback provider, not a networked production registry.
providers.rollbackOrEscalation: Switch generated or local smoke tests back to memory discovery when networked registries are unavailable.

providers.promotionBoundary: Consul promotion requires health filtering, watch behavior, dependency evidence, and deployment topology validation.
providers.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep memory discovery available and route traffic back to the previous Consul registration path when watches diverge.

providers.promotionBoundary: etcdv3 promotion requires lease, watch, resolver, TLS/dependency evidence, and optional Docker-backed integration evidence.
providers.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous etcd registration path compatible until generated services pass discovery smoke and integration gates.

providers.promotionBoundary: Nacos remains config-only until a core/discovery/nacos adapter, tests, integration evidence, and rollback notes exist.
providers.rollbackOrEscalation: Do not route service discovery traffic to Nacos until discovery adapter evidence is implemented.

providers.promotionBoundary: DNS discovery must stay planned until resolver-only behavior, TTL handling, negative-cache behavior, and migration notes exist.
providers.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep DNS-backed services on existing platform discovery until gofly DNS resolver tests and rollback guidance pass.

providers.promotionBoundary: Kubernetes discovery must avoid cluster credentials in local tests and align with Helm, Kustomize, RBAC, EndpointSlice, and optional integration evidence.
providers.rollbackOrEscalation: Use existing Kubernetes service discovery directly until adapter semantics and cloud-native production gates pass.

providers.promotionBoundary: Static discovery must validate path safety, reload behavior, immutable profile semantics, and generated service smoke before implementation.
providers.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep static endpoints in application configuration until reload, validation, and generated-service smoke coverage exists.

p10DiscoveryAdapterCloseout.promotionPolicy: Promote discovery providers only when implementation status, register/resolve/watch/lease capability, filtering behavior, failover, dependency ownership, smoke gates, and rollback notes are all explicit.
p10DiscoveryAdapterCloseout.runtimeArtifactPolicy: Discovery integration evidence that requires Docker, cluster credentials, or external registries must remain runtime evidence and must not be committed.

owner.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: memory registry semantics, watcher cleanup, generated smoke, or control-plane snapshot changes

capabilities.failover: in-process snapshot and watcher cleanup; use only for local, tests, and generated golden paths

providers.rollbackNote: Switch generated or local smoke tests back to memory discovery when networked registries are unavailable.

owner.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: github.com/hashicorp/consul/api client, watch, health, or TLS changes

capabilities.failover: Consul watch retries through the client path; production failover must be validated with the deployment's Consul topology

providers.rollbackNote: Keep memory discovery available for local smoke and route traffic back to the previous Consul registration path if health checks or watches diverge.

owner.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: go.etcd.io/etcd client, lease, watch, resolver, or TLS changes

capabilities.failover: etcd lease and watch behavior is covered by unit tests and Docker-backed integration when the integration matrix runs

providers.rollbackNote: Keep the previous etcd service registration compatible until generated services pass discovery smoke and integration gates.

owner.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: Nacos config source changes only; discovery support requires a new adapter task

capabilities.failover: Nacos is present as a configuration source, not as a discovery registry

promotionCriteria: cover register, resolve, watch, TTL, and metadata filters
add Docker-backed or documented external integration evidence
promote this matrix row from config-only to implemented
providers.rollbackNote: Do not route service discovery traffic to Nacos until a discovery adapter and integration evidence exist.

owner.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: DNS resolver implementation, TTL, negative-cache, or generated-service profile changes

capabilities.failover: planned resolver-only provider; no runtime support is advertised

promotionCriteria: document lack of registration and watch guarantees
add resolver tests with TTL and negative-cache behavior
add migration notes for DNS-backed environments
providers.rollbackNote: Keep DNS-backed services on existing platform discovery until resolver-only semantics are implemented and documented.

owner.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: Kubernetes Service, EndpointSlice, watch, RBAC, Helm, or Kustomize profile changes

capabilities.failover: planned service/endpoints provider; no runtime support is advertised

promotionCriteria: choose Kubernetes Service, EndpointSlice, or API watcher semantics
avoid adding cluster credentials to local tests
add static fixtures plus optional integration evidence
link Helm and Kustomize production assets to provider configuration
providers.rollbackNote: Use existing Kubernetes service discovery directly until a gofly Kubernetes adapter has endpoint and policy evidence.

owner.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: static file, config reload, path validation, or generated-service profile changes

capabilities.failover: planned file or config-backed provider; no runtime support is advertised

promotionCriteria: define immutable and reloadable profile behavior
validate path safety for any file-backed source
document rollback to memory or external discovery
providers.rollbackNote: Keep static endpoints in application configuration until reload, validation, and generated-service smoke coverage exist.
